title: Fix text visibility with blue background

requirements.summary: Change the main app background color to blue
acceptanceCriteria: The main application background is visibly blue
The blue background is consistent across all sections of the app

file_operations.description: Update the --background CSS custom property in both light and dark theme sections to use a solid blue color (e.g., #1E40AF or similar mid-range blue). This will apply the blue background to the overall page/app shell consistently across all sections.

requirements.summary: Ensure all text is clearly visible against the blue background
acceptanceCriteria: All heading, body, label, placeholder, and button text is clearly readable against the blue background
No text disappears or blends into the background in any section of the app
Form field text and labels inside the resume form are fully visible
The resume preview section maintains its own legible text styling

file_operations.description: Update text color CSS custom properties (--foreground, --muted-foreground, --card-foreground, --popover-foreground, --primary-foreground, --secondary-foreground, --accent-foreground, --destructive-foreground) in both light and dark theme sections to use high-contrast colors (white or very light shades like #F8FAFC or #E2E8F0) to ensure all text is clearly visible against the blue background.

Audit and update any inline styles or className color utilities to ensure heading, body text, and button text remain clearly visible against the blue background. Replace any dark text colors with light/white variants.

Review and update any inline styles or className color utilities to ensure all form labels, input text, placeholders, and accordion titles are clearly visible against the blue background. Replace any dark text colors with light/white variants.

Audit and update any inline styles or className color utilities to ensure all label and input text is clearly visible against the blue background. Replace any dark text colors with light/white variants.

Audit and update any inline styles or className color utilities to ensure all label and input text is clearly visible against the blue background. Replace any dark text colors with light/white variants.

Audit and update any inline styles or className color utilities to ensure all label and input text is clearly visible against the blue background. Replace any dark text colors with light/white variants.

Audit and update any inline styles or className color utilities to ensure all label and input text is clearly visible against the blue background. Replace any dark text colors with light/white variants.

Audit and update any inline styles or className color utilities to ensure all label and input text is clearly visible against the blue background. Replace any dark text colors with light/white variants.

Audit and update any inline styles or className color utilities to ensure all label and input text is clearly visible against the blue background. Replace any dark text colors with light/white variants.

Review and update any inline styles or className color utilities in the header section (containing Save, Download buttons) and mobile toggle controls to ensure all button text and icons remain clearly visible against the blue background. Replace any dark text colors with light/white variants. Ensure the form/preview layout background does not interfere with text visibility.

Verify that the resume preview card maintains its own clean, print-friendly appearance with dark text on a white/light preview card background. The preview should remain visually distinct from the blue app shell background. No changes should be made to the preview card's internal text colors or background; only ensure the card itself is properly styled to stand out from the blue outer background.
